steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a difference between the two lighthouse keepers. A correct answer must explicitly contrast the two keepers — not describe only one of them and not highlight a similarity.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — "As the lighthouse keeper at Point Fermin Light, Thelma Austin helped watercraft navigate at night.": This describes only Thelma Austin and makes no comparison to Betsy Morrow Humphrey. ✗
  • Choice B — "From 1862 to 1880, the nighttime waters of Maine were made more navigable thanks to Betsy Morrow Humphrey.": This describes only Betsy Morrow Humphrey and makes no comparison to Thelma Austin. ✗
  • Choice C — "Betsy Morrow Humphrey worked as a lighthouse keeper in an earlier century than did Thelma Austin.": This directly contrasts the two keepers by noting Betsy served in the 1800s (1862–1880) while Thelma served in the 1900s (1925–1941) — a clear difference drawn from the notes. ✓
  • Choice D — "Betsy Morrow Humphrey and Thelma Austin both played crucial roles in ensuring safe navigation for watercraft in past centuries.": "Both" emphasizes a similarity, not a difference. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
